task: Look up the current temperature for zip code 10019.

- 🌡️ Temperature: 1°C (34°F)
- 🌤️ Conditions: Clear
- 🥶 Feels Like: -2°C (28°F)

(Data was observed approximately 12 minutes prior to lookup.)
